3112020.name: Zebulon : A Lost Cat - Pico 8 Cartridge
3112020.description:
With this free DLC, you will get a Pico 8 cartridge as well as all the source code of the game in a readable format as well as a level editor!
Pico 8 is a fantasy console for making, sharing and playing tiny games.

  • Play Zebulon : A Lost Cat as a pure Pico-8 cartridge. Use it in the Pico 8 software itself on any hardware supported by it
  • Look inside the source code, how it's done, modify it and have fun !
  • Change the level of the game using a tiny custom level editor made in Pico 8 itself
    You will need a pico-8 software in order to use this cart.
